payload.summary: Phase 1 scoping grilled with Jim 2026-07-21. Resolved: roadmap Phase 1 scope stands; routing config in P1 / dispatch in P2 (ADR-0015); hardening items interleave, 2 scaffolding-tooling items wait for retirement call; scaffolding retires as workflows port AND import --from-ccpm is real scope (speed-count-game + other live ccpm projects); PRDs in docs/prds with lifecycle on work items (ADR-0013); port order feature lane -> bug lane -> importer; inception ships seed+standard+brownfield, full tier deferred; recall = deterministic keyword search over observations, compaction nag via validate threshold; skills v1 delegates fetch to skills CLI, markdown-only; run contract = config section with env-var names only (ADR-0014); lab = speed-count-game. Deliverable of this item: the Phase 1 PRD in docs/prds/ authored from these decisions.
